'''dhayaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilgae|oilgae]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilgae|oilgae]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhayaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyæjæth|dhæyæjæth]] || [[word:dhæyæjæj|dhæyæjæj]] || [[word:dhæyæjæsh|dhæyæjæsh]] || [[word:dhæyæjæ|dhæyæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayayajath|dhayayajath]] || [[word:dhayayajaj|dhayayajaj]] || [[word:dhayayajash|dhayayajash]] || [[word:dhayayaja|dhayayaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayajath|dhayajath]] || [[word:dhayajaj|dhayajaj]] || [[word:dhayajash|dhayajash]] || [[word:dhayaja|dhayaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayafjath|dhayafjath]] || [[word:dhayafjaj|dhayafjaj]] || [[word:dhayafjash|dhayafjash]] || [[word:dhayafjaf|dhayafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayajatha|dhayajatha]] || [[word:dhayajaja|dhayajaja]] || [[word:dhayajasha|dhayajasha]] || [[word:dhayajaka|dhayajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayajath|dhayajath]] || [[word:dhayajaj|dhayajaj]] || [[word:dhayajash|dhayajash]] || [[word:dhayaja|dhayaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayajathal|dhayajathal]] || [[word:dhayajajal|dhayajajal]] || [[word:dhayajashal|dhayajashal]] || [[word:dhayajakal|dhayajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayajathatha|dhayajathatha]] || [[word:dhayajajaja|dhayajajaja]] || [[word:dhayajashasha|dhayajashasha]] || [[word:dhayajaka|dhayajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayajathan|dhayajathan]] || [[word:dhayajajan|dhayajajan]] || [[word:dhayajashan|dhayajashan]] || [[word:dhayajakan|dhayajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayajathaoro|dhayajathaoro]] || [[word:dhayajajaoro|dhayajajaoro]] || [[word:dhayajashaoro|dhayajashaoro]] || [[word:dhayajakaoro|dhayajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
